title: Workflow
description: Owl workflow source body. Stage 8 fixes the contract for the optional `publishes` field; the rest of the workflow body is intentionally left open (additionalProperties: true) until a later stage tightens the full schema.

from.description: Source path template, relative to the `tasks` storage role. Supports {{task.id}} and {{task.slug}}.

to.description: Destination path template, relative to the `docs` storage role. Supports {{task.id}} and {{task.slug}}.
